title: Handoff
description: The validated edge between two tasks. This is where 'contract-compliant' is enforced: the producing task's output is validated against the consuming task's input schema BEFORE the consumer runs. No validation, no handoff.

produced.description: Output of from_task, becoming input of to_task.

schema_ref.description: Schema the produced payload was validated against.

validated.description: True only if produced passed schema_ref validation.
